text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
February is here. With the Osaka Hai fast
approaching, Air Groove is bursting with the
desire to surpass Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an attempt to stay apace with Air Groove's
enthusiasm, I end up working deep into the night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after training with Air Groove, I'm
sitting in my office when...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's rather late. Burning the midnight oil, are you?
choice_data_list: Well, the Osaka Hai is coming up.
Well, the Osaka Hai is coming up.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Indeed...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just don't push yourself too hard. Our health is
our greatest asset. I can't have you collapsing
when I need you most.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please do.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: How about some tea?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No. You stay right where you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's tone doesn't leave any room for
argument, so I remain seated and continue
working, until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plunk...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...a mug is placed on my desk. A sweet aroma
wafts up from the beverage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that Air Groove has made me some hot
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Drink up. The temperature is due to drop again
today. This should help keep you alert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she says. Warmth floods throughout my
body as I consume the sweet drink.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Consider it a small thank-you for your help every
day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Besides, you know how much I like my holidays.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, it suddenly occurs to me that today
is Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have to be up early tomorrow, so I'll be taking
my leave now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Be sure to savor each sip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's kindness warms me—heart, body,
and soul.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...a cup of coffee is placed on my desk.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Also... take this too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Sugar helps a tired brain. Open it up and have
some.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the wrapped package she hands me to find
a beautiful box of chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her sudden gift, I realize that today is
Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Judging by your expression, it appears you had
forgotten what day it is. Consider this a token of
thanks for your help every day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Enough with the staring. Hurry up and eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eat one of the chocolates. It's sweet with bitter
undertones—a rich and sophisticated flavor.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A word of advice. While it may be true that
beautiful flowers grow in troubled soil...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Nothing good comes from toil for the sake of it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even the toughest of flowers eventually need
nourishment. It's when the drought ends and rain
finally falls that they bloom most brightly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself too hard. Take some time off
to eat something sweet once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And... I want to tell you that you're doing a good
job. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have to be up early tomorrow, so I'll be taking
my leave now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging by her manner of speech, I wonder if Air
Groove was a little embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, I can sense her kindness in the
chocolates she gave me. I eat another and enjoy
the warmth that fills me.
